requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — ZABS Conformity Requirement for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——ZABS电动汽车充电桩合格评定要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——ZABS電動汽車充電樁合格評定要求

summary.en: ZABS (Zambia Bureau of Standards) is Zambia's national standards body and operates an import conformity assessment programme for regulated products. ZABS adopts IEC standards as Zambia Standards (ZS), meaning IEC 61851-1 (EV conductive charging system general requirements) and IEC 61851-23 (DC EV charging stations) form the applicable safety baseline for EV chargers imported into or deployed in Zambia. IEC 61851-1 covers control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions. IP rating under IEC 60529 is required for outdoor chargers — IP54 minimum for outdoor AC chargers in Zambia's environment (tropical climate with humidity and dust, though less extreme than Gulf states). ERB licensing for electrical installation activities and ZESCO connection approval apply in addition to ZABS product conformity. The ZABS import conformity route for electrical equipment should be confirmed for the specific HS code before shipment; a mandatory Certificate of Conformity (CoC) requirement for electrical imports under ZABS is the applicable gate.
summary.zh: ZABS（赞比亚标准局）是赞比亚国家标准机构，负责对受管制产品实施进口合格评定计划。ZABS将IEC标准采纳为赞比亚标准（ZS），因此IEC 61851-1（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求）和IEC 61851-23（直流电动汽车充电站）构成进口或部署于赞比亚的电动汽车充电桩的适用安全基线。IEC 61851-1涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。室外充电桩须符合IEC 60529规定的IP防护等级——赞比亚环境（热带气候，含湿度和粉尘，但不及海湾国家极端）下室外交流充电桩最低要求IP54。ERB电气安装活动许可和ZESCO接入批准在ZABS产品合格评定之外另行适用。应在出货前针对具体HS编码确认ZABS电气设备进口合格评定路径；ZABS对电气进口的强制合格证书（CoC）要求是适用的监管门槛。
summary.zht: ZABS（尚比亞標準局）是尚比亞國家標準機構，負責對受管制產品實施進口合格評定計劃。ZABS將IEC標準採納為尚比亞標準（ZS），因此IEC 61851-1（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求）和IEC 61851-23（直流電動汽車充電站）構成進口或部署於尚比亞的電動汽車充電樁的適用安全基線。IEC 61851-1涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。室外充電樁須符合IEC 60529規定的IP防護等級——尚比亞環境（熱帶氣候，含濕度和粉塵，但不及海灣國家極端）下室外交流充電樁最低要求IP54。ERB電氣安裝活動許可和ZESCO接入批准在ZABS產品合格評定之外另行適用。應在出貨前針對具體HS編碼確認ZABS電氣設備進口合格評定路徑；ZABS對電氣進口的強制合格證書（CoC）要求是適用的監管門檻。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum for outdoor AC chargers in tropical climate
ZABS import conformity assessment programme — Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for regulated electrical imports (zabs.org.zm)
ERB licensing requirements for electrical installation activities (erb.org.zm)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports required under the ZABS import conformity route. China CCC (where in scope) does not substitute for ZABS CoC.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代ZABS进口合格评定路径下所要求的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。中国CCC（在适用范围内）不能替代ZABS CoC。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代ZABS進口合格評定路徑下所要求的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。中國CCC（在適用範圍內）不能替代ZABS CoC。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)
China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix; accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products; IP54 / IP65 test certificates for outdoor enclosures appropriate to Zambia's tropical climate (dust and humidity); protective device ratings; thermal evidence for Zambia's ambient temperature range; installation instructions aligned with ZABS / ERB requirements; and confirmation of the ZABS CoC route for the specific HS code. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment. ERB installation licensing and ZESCO connection approval are separate from the product CoC.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵；ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据；适应赞比亚热带气候（粉尘和湿度）的室外壳体IP54 / IP65测试证书；保护器件额定值；赞比亚环境温度范围的热证据；符合ZABS / ERB要求的安装说明；以及针对具体HS编码确认的ZABS CoC路径。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。ERB安装许可和ZESCO并网批准与产品CoC相互独立。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣；ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據；適應尚比亞熱帶氣候（粉塵和濕度）的室外殼體IP54 / IP65測試證書；保護器件額定值；尚比亞環境溫度範圍的熱證據；符合ZABS / ERB要求的安裝說明；以及針對具體HS編碼確認的ZABS CoC路徑。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。ERB安裝許可和ZESCO併網批准與產品CoC相互獨立。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ZABS import CoC for regulated electrical products; IEC 61851 is the applicable safety standard under ZABS IEC adoption; ERB licensing for electrical installations; ZESCO connection approval for grid-connected chargers
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence under ZABS without additional accredited testing; China CCC is not a ZABS CoC substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Zambia-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates for tropical climate, and confirmation of the ZABS CoC route for the specific HS code. ERB licensing and ZESCO connection approval are additional parallel requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向赞比亚的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、热带气候室外壳体IP防护等级认证书，以及针对具体HS编码确认的ZABS CoC路径。ERB许可和ZESCO并网批准是额外的并行要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向尚比亞的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、熱帶氣候室外殼體IP防護等級認證書，以及針對具體HS編碼確認的ZABS CoC路徑。ERB許可和ZESCO併網批准是額外的並行要求。
